CEActionAdminDungeonOverview.name: Dungeon Overview
CEActionAdminDungeonOverview.description: View dungeon levels, their instances, and players in them.

CEActionRespawn.name: Respawn
CEActionRespawn.description: Return to the lobby to start new game.

CEActionToggleLookUp.name: Look up
CEActionToggleLookUp.description: You lift your head and look up at the sky.

CEClothingBackBackpack.name: backpack
CEClothingBackBackpack.description: A standard backpack with decent storage space. Perfect for everyday use. It covers your back from blows!

CEClothingBackSatchel.name: rustic satchel
CEClothingBackSatchel.description: A handcrafted leather satchel with rustic charm. Provides modest storage with traditional styling. Can be worn on the over the shoulder.

CEClothingAccessoryAmuletFireStar.name: Laozel's Scorching Edge
CEClothingAccessoryAmuletFireStar.description: A mystical amulet shaped like a fire. Increases all outgoing [color=#ff4500]fire damage[/color] by 3.

CEClothingAccessoryAmuletIceStar.name: Mierza star
CEClothingAccessoryAmuletIceStar.description: A mystical amulet shaped like a frozen star. Increases all outgoing [color=#05eeff]cold damage[/color] by 3.

CEClothingAccessoryAmuletVitality.name: vitality amulet
CEClothingAccessoryAmuletVitality.description: An amulet that enhances the body's ability to heal, increasing all incoming healing by 5.

CEClothingAccessoryCrownOfThorns.name: crown of thorns
CEClothingAccessoryCrownOfThorns.description: When you take damage in melee combat, you deal 6 physical damage to the attacker.

CEClothingAccessoryEnergyGeode.name: energy geode
CEClothingAccessoryEnergyGeode.description: A cracked geode containing energy crystals. It increases the owner's [color=#3296fa]maximum mana pool by 20[/color] and can function as a energy storage.

CEClothingAccessoryFighterGloves.name: fighter Gloves
CEClothingAccessoryFighterGloves.description: Heavyweight fighting gloves. Increases all outgoing melee [color=#05eeff]physical damage[/color] by 3.

CEClothingAccessoryFlamingStone.name: flaming stone
CEClothingAccessoryFlamingStone.description: Your melee attacks set targets on [color=#ff4500]fire[/color]

CEClothingAccessoryRingFire.name: fire ring
CEClothingAccessoryRingFire.description: A protective ring that shields the carrier from the heat of the fire.

CEClothingAccessoryRingFrost.name: frost ring
CEClothingAccessoryRingFrost.description: A protective ring that shields the carrier from the cold.

CEClothingArmorBase.name: armor
CEClothingArmorBase.description: Protect your internal organs from being pierced by sharp foreign objects.

CEClothingPantsBase.name: pants
CEClothingPantsBase.description: Pants to cover my thighs from the cold.

CESteamEffect.name: steam
CESteamEffect.description: A burst of steam from opposing elements colliding.

CEBaseBiomeSpawner.name: biome spawner
CEBaseBiomeSpawner.description: Spawns of various biomes on the map.

CEActionFireConstructFirebolt.name: Firebolt
CEActionFireConstructFirebolt.description: You hurl a 3 fireballs that explodes on impact, setting the ground and creatures [color=#ff8a05]on fire[/color].

CEActionGnomeJump.name: fire slime jump
CEActionGnomeJump.description: The slime leaps toward a target.

CEActionGnomeThrowStone.name: Throw stone
CEActionGnomeThrowStone.description: You throw a stone at your enemy, dealing minor damage.

CEActionGnomeHeal.name: Cure wounds
CEActionGnomeHeal.description: You restore [color=#1defa9]5 health[/color] to the creature you touch.

CEActionGnomeThrowRat.name: Rat throw
CEActionGnomeThrowRat.description: You throw a rat at your enemy.

CEActionFireSlimeJump.name: fire slime jump
CEActionFireSlimeJump.description: The slime leaps toward a target.

CEActionWaterSlimeJump.name: water slime jump
CEActionWaterSlimeJump.description: The slime leaps toward a target.

CEConsumableBloodRose.name: blood rose
CEConsumableBloodRose.description: A scarlet rose that grows in places where much blood has been shed. In the right hands, it serves as an ingredient for healing potions.

CEConsumableBlueAelyta.name: blue aelyta
CEConsumableBlueAelyta.description: A blue flower that grows in areas where magical energy congregates. In the right hands, it serves as an ingredient for mana-restoring potions.

CEConsumableYellowDayflin.name: yellow dayflin
CEConsumableYellowDayflin.description: A yellow flower that is remarkable for its ability to grow quickly almost anywhere.

CEIronKey.name: iron key
CEIronKey.description: A worn iron key. Fits a golden lock.

CEKnowledgeBook_Acceleration.name: acceleration
CEKnowledgeBook_Acceleration.description: This slim volume contains a detailed recipe for brewing a potion that increases movement speed for a short duration.

CEKnowledgeBook_BasicAlchemy.name: basic alchemy
CEKnowledgeBook_BasicAlchemy.description: A Guide to Alchemy for Complete Beginners. This book describes basic recipes for brewing the most common and simple potions.

CEKnowledgeBook_AlchemicalBombs.name: alchemical bombs
CEKnowledgeBook_AlchemicalBombs.description: Do you want to unleash scorching fire or freezing cold on your enemies? But you don’t want to waste your mana? This treatise will be the greatest discovery of your life.

CEKnowledgeBook_ManaConservation.name: mana conservation
CEKnowledgeBook_ManaConservation.description: A description of a magical technique that allows you to preserve your own magical energy in liquid form. It's not the most pleasant process, but it serves as an alternative to creating mana-restoring potions.

CEKnowledgeBook_Regeneration.name: regeneration
CEKnowledgeBook_Regeneration.description: This slim volume contains a detailed recipe for brewing a health-regeneration potion. Useful information!

CEBaseKnowledgeBook.name: knowledge scroll
CEBaseKnowledgeBook.description: An ancient scroll containing knowledge of item creation. Read it to learn recipes.

CEConsumableSlimeCoreFire.name: Fire slime core
CEConsumableSlimeCoreFire.description: A pulsating core from a fire slime. It heats the surrounding air but is cool to the touch. It seems fragile.

CEConsumableSlimeCoreWater.name: Water slime core
CEConsumableSlimeCoreWater.description: A pulsating core from a water slime. It humidifies the surrounding air. It seems fragile.

CEPotionBase.name: empty vial
CEPotionBase.description: A potion was poured here once. Or will be. Who knows?

CEGlassShard.name: glass shard
CEGlassShard.description: Sharp pieces of glass. Don't step on it!

CESoulShard.name: soul essence
CESoulShard.description: A fragment of the soul that can be offered as a gift to sacred statues in exchange for powerful blessings

CECoinSilver1.name: silver coin
CECoinSilver1.description: A valuable coin made from a precisely calibrated silver alloy... and something else. Equal in value to ten coppers.

CECoinGold1.name: gold coin
CECoinGold1.description: A gold, big, beautiful coin. Valuable enough to be stolen by bandits. Equal in value to ten silver coins.

CECoinPlatinum1.name: platinum coin
CECoinPlatinum1.description: A platinum coin? It's so rare. Ten gold pieces is the price of one.

CEInstrumentFlute.name: flute
CEInstrumentFlute.description: A compact musical wind instrument, popular in villages as well as with large musical troupes.

CEInstrumentLyra.name: lyra
CEInstrumentLyra.description: A common stringed instrument throughout Sylate, popular with various bards and musical troupes.

CEInstrumentGuitarSkeleton.name: skelute
CEInstrumentGuitarSkeleton.description: A true weapon for brutal rock skeletons. What does "rock" mean?

CEWeaponMagicStaffHealing.name: healing staff
CEWeaponMagicStaffHealing.description: A staff imbued with healing magic. Restores health to anything it hit.

CEWeaponMagicStaffIce.name: ice staff
CEWeaponMagicStaffIce.description: A staff imbued with ice magic. Launches freezing projectiles at enemies.

CEWeaponMagicStaffMagicMissile.name: magic missile staff
CEWeaponMagicStaffMagicMissile.description: A mage's standard weapon that fires compressed beams of energy.

CEWeaponMagicStaffSparkle.name: fire sparkle staff
CEWeaponMagicStaffSparkle.description: The simplest magical weapon that shoots hot sparks

CEWeaponMagicStaffWater.name: water staff
CEWeaponMagicStaffWater.description: A staff imbued with water magic. Launches slow water orbs that drench and repel their target.

CEWeaponStaffHolyStick.name: holy stick
CEWeaponStaffHolyStick.description: Sometimes, to bless someone, you have to give them a firm tap on the head.

CEWeaponDaggerPurification.name: purification dagger
CEWeaponDaggerPurification.description: An enchanted dagger that cleanses the target of all negative status effects.

CEWeaponSpearIron.name: iron spear
CEWeaponSpearIron.description: A long iron-tipped spear. Excellent reach keeps enemies at bay.

CEWeaponSpearSoulCatcher.name: soul catcher
CEWeaponSpearSoulCatcher.description: A rare magical weapon that does not deal physical damage but wounds the soul, draining mana from it and transferring it to the wielder

CEWeaponSwordBone.name: bone sword
CEWeaponSwordBone.description: Nicks on the blade leave bruise wounds, increasing the damage dealt to the target

CEWeaponSwordIron.name: iron sword
CEWeaponSwordIron.description: A finely crafted sword favored by imperial officers. Its blade gleams with authority and tradition.

CEWeaponTwoHandedSwordIron.name: iron two-handed sword
CEWeaponTwoHandedSwordIron.description: A large and heavy two-handed sword. Heavy means reliable.

CEWeaponStaffWooden.name: wooden staff
CEWeaponStaffWooden.description: A long wooden stick with an iron tip.

CEStatusEffectDivineShield.name: Divine Shield
CEStatusEffectDivineShield.description: When you heal something, you heal [color=#1defa9]2 health[/color] more.

CEActionFrozenBreak.name: Break free
CEActionFrozenBreak.description: You break free from the icy trap.

CEStatusEffectWet.name: Wet
CEStatusEffectWet.description: Soaked with water. Fire has no power here.

CEBonfire.name: Bonfire
CEBonfire.description: Interact to restore health and mana. TODO: immersive name and description

CEChasm.name: chasm
CEChasm.description: You can't even see the bottom.

CEFogGate.name: fog gate
CEFogGate.description: A mysterious wall of dense fog. Those who approach from the front pass through freely; those who approach from behind find it impassable.

CEUpgradeStatue.name: Level up statue
CEUpgradeStatue.description: Interact to level up. TODO: immersive name and description

CEUpgradePostament.name: Level up postament
CEUpgradePostament.description: Select one of the upgrade options to apply it. TODO: immersive name and description

CEWater.name: water
CEWater.description: You're definitely going to get your feet wet

CEIce.name: ice
CEIce.description: Slippery cold ice. Watch your step.

CEIceFrozenStream.description: A frozen stream, the current trapped under ice.

CEWaterPoisoned.name: poisoned water
CEWaterPoisoned.description: This water has been contaminated with a dangerous substance.

CEIceFrozenPoisonedStream.description: A frozen stream, the current trapped under ice.

CEBaseFenceBig.name: big fence
CEBaseFenceBig.description: You definitely need a towel to get to the other side

CEBaseFenceGateBig.name: fence big gate
CEBaseFenceGateBig.description: Big man-sized gates. What's your next move?

CEBaseFence.name: fence
CEBaseFence.description: A low fence restricting movement in a purely nominal way.

CEBaseFenceGate.name: fence gate
CEBaseFenceGate.description: You have two paths. You can open the door like a normal person, or you can climb over the door like a funny person.

CEWallInvinsible.name: invinsible barrier
CEWallInvinsible.description: invinsible and indestructible wall for admemes.

CEBaseWall.name: wall
CEBaseWall.description: Sturdy enough to cover you from threats or cold winds.

CEBaseWallFrame.description: This wall is now in an indeterminate state between existence and non-existence.

CEBaseFastPortal.name: fast portal
CEBaseFastPortal.description: Transports you to a another place!

CEBossDoorStartDelete.name: boss door
CEBossDoorStartDelete.description: This door looks like it leads to a boss fight. Are you sure you want to open it?

CEBossDoorMirroredStartDelete.suffix: Deleted on START boss fight, Mirrored

CEDungeonPortalBase.name: dungeon portal
CEDungeonPortalBase.description: A shimmering rift between dungeon levels.

CEDungeonLevelExitBase.name: dungeon rift
CEDungeonLevelExitBase.description: A rift leading deeper into the dungeon. Interact to enter.

CEDungeonLevelEntry.name: dungeon entry point
CEDungeonLevelEntry.description: An arrival point for adventurers entering this level.

CEWayfindingStone.name: waystone
CEWayfindingStone.description: An ancient stone with a map of known levels carved into its sides. Touch it to see where other travelers are currently located.

CETableWooden.name: wooden table
CETableWooden.description: A simple table made of boards.

CEHighBush.name: high bush
CEHighBush.description: Very tall and dense thickets. Perhaps someone is watching you from them

CEBaseTree.name: tree
CEBaseTree.description: Decades of life and growth, saturating the surrounding nature with fresh air.

CEWaterLilies.name: water lilies
CEWaterLilies.description: Wow, these are plants that don't grow on land, but on water! Nature is amazing.

CEWaterReeds.name: reed
CEWaterReeds.description: Usually grows in swamps and on river banks.

CEGatherableBloodRose.name: blood roses
CEGatherableBloodRose.description: Scarlet roses growing in places where much blood has been shed. In the right hands, it serves as an ingredient for healing potions.

CEGatherableBlueAelyta.name: blue aelyta
CEGatherableBlueAelyta.description: A blue flower that grows in areas where magical energy congregates. In the right hands, it serves as an ingredient for mana-restoring potions.A blue flower that grows in areas where magical energy congregates. In the right hands, it serves as an ingredient for mana-restoring potions.

CEGatherableYellowDayflin.name: yellow dayflin
CEGatherableYellowDayflin.description: A flower that is remarkable for its ability to grow quickly almost anywhere.

CETileEffectBlessing.name: blessing
CETileEffectBlessing.description: A benevolent blessing that increases all incoming healing.

CETileEffectCurse.name: curse
CETileEffectCurse.description: A malevolent curse that increases all incoming damage.

CETileEffectFire.name: fire
CETileEffectFire.description: A scorching hot flame. You definitely shouldn't touch it just like that.

CEFireImpactEffect.name: fire impact
CEFireImpactEffect.description: A burst of fire upon impact.

CETileEffectCursedFire.name: cursed fire
CETileEffectCursedFire.description: a searing, unquenchable flame, eternally fueled by a curse

CETileEffectStoneBarrier.name: stone barrier
CETileEffectStoneBarrier.description: A sturdy stone barrier that blocks movement and projectiles.

CEDustTileEffect.name: dust effect
CEDustTileEffect.description: A burst of dust upon impact.

CETileEffectWater.name: water splash
CETileEffectWater.description: A splash of water upon impact.

CEBaseMagicRune.name: magic rune
CEBaseMagicRune.description: manifestation of magical energy in the physical plane

CEBaseMagicImpact.name: magic impact
CEBaseMagicImpact.description: manifestation of magical energy in the physical plane

CEActionSpellCruelty.name: Cruelty
CEActionSpellCruelty.description: Your next melee attack applies [color=#b2e3eb]5 Bruise[/color] stacks, increasing the physical damage taken by targets.

CEStatusEffectCruelty.name: Cruelty
CEStatusEffectCruelty.description: Your next melee attack applies [color=#b2e3eb]5 Bruise[/color] stacks, increasing the physical damage taken by targets.

CEActionKick.name: Kick
CEActionKick.description: A powerful kick that deals 15 damage in melee combat and strongly knocks back targets

CEActionSpellRaiseShields.name: Raise Shields
CEActionSpellRaiseShields.description: You grant [color=#b2e3eb]35 physical shields[/color] to all creatures in a small area.

CEActionSpellStoneSkin.name: Stone Skin
CEActionSpellStoneSkin.description: Grants [color=#b2e3eb]50 temporary shields[/color] that absorb damage. Shields decay over time.

CEActionStoneWall.name: Stone Wall
CEActionStoneWall.description: You raise a [color=#aaaaaa]stone barrier[/color] beneath your cursor.

CEActionWaveOfSpikes.name: Wave of spikes
CEActionWaveOfSpikes.description: You unleash a wave of [color=#ff4500]sharp spikes[/color].

CEStatusEffectFortress.name: Fortress
CEStatusEffectFortress.description: When you apply [color=#b2e3eb]temporary shields[/color] on someone, you gain [color=#b2e3eb]10 temporary shields[/color].

CEActionFirebolt.name: Firebolt
CEActionFirebolt.description: You hurl a fireball that explodes on impact, setting the ground and creatures [color=#ff8a05]on fire[/color].

CEActionFirewall.name: Firewall
CEActionFirewall.description: You create a wall of fire that sets creatures and the ground [color=#ff8a05]on fire[/color].

CEActionFireWave.name: Fire wave
CEActionFireWave.description: You unleash a wave of fire, dealing massive [color=#ff4500]fire damage[/color] in close distance.

CEActionFrostBlade.name: Frost blade
CEActionFrostBlade.description: You create a powerful temporary weapon made of ice that deals high damage and [color=#30caf5]freezes[/color] targets.

CEWeaponSwordFrostTemporary.name: frost blade
CEWeaponSwordFrostTemporary.description: A magical weapon woven from ice, which will soon melt away.

CEActionFrostFlow.name: Frost Flow
CEActionFrostFlow.description: You unleash a stream of frost that covers the ground in [color=#30caf5]ice[/color] and [color=#30caf5]slows[/color] creatures caught in it.

CEActionHealingFrost.name: Healing Frost
CEActionHealingFrost.description: You restore [color=#1defa9]15 health[/color] to a target and apply [color=#30caf5]5 freeze stacks[/color].

CEActionManaGift.name: Mana Gift
CEActionManaGift.description: Restore [color=#3082f5]25 mana[/color] to the selected target

CEActionManaSteal.name: Mana Steal
CEActionManaSteal.description: Steal [color=#3082f5]20 mana[/color] from the selected target and transfer it to yourself.

CEActionTripleIcicles.name: Triple Icicles
CEActionTripleIcicles.description: You unleash three icicles that deal [color=#30caf5]cold[/color] damage and [color=#30caf5]freeze[/color] the area on hit.

CEStatusEffectAffinityFire.name: Fire Affinity
CEStatusEffectAffinityFire.description: You take 5 less [color=#ff8a05]fire damage[/color] from all sources.

CEStatusEffectAffinityIce.name: Ice Affinity
CEStatusEffectAffinityIce.description: You take 5 less [color=#05eeff]cold damage[/color] from all sources and are immune to [color=#05eeff]cold slowdown[/color] and [color=#05eeff]frozen[/color].

CEStatusEffectCursedFlame.name: Cursed Flame
CEStatusEffectCursedFlame.description: Every flame you create is cursed.

CEStatusEffectDanceOfFireAndIce.name: Dance of Fire and Ice
CEStatusEffectDanceOfFireAndIce.description: You deal [color=#ff8a05]5 bonus fire damage[/color] to [color=#05eeff]frozen[/color] targets and [color=#05eeff]5 bonus cold damage[/color] to [color=#ff8a05]burning[/color] targets.

CEStatusEffectManaCore.name: Magic Core
CEStatusEffectManaCore.description: [color=#1776eb]Mana regeneration[/color] from all sources has been [color=#1776eb]doubled[/color]

CEStatusEffectSharpFloor.name: Sharp Floor
CEStatusEffectSharpFloor.description: When you freeze an area, you also cover it with sharp ice spikes.

CEActionSpellAcceleration.name: Acceleration
CEActionSpellAcceleration.description: Increases your movement speed for a short duration.

CEActionFireCreation.name: Fire creation
CEActionFireCreation.description: You create a temporary [color=#ff4500]fire[/color], which you can throw.

CEHandheldFire.name: handheld fire
CEHandheldFire.description: A small flame, burning in your hand. It can be thrown to burn something.

CEActionSpellSmallBarrier.name: Barrier
CEActionSpellSmallBarrier.description: Grants [color=#b2e3eb]20 temporary shields[/color] that absorb damage. Shields decay over time.

CEActionSpellSphereOfLight.name: Sphere of Light
CEActionSpellSphereOfLight.description: You can make almost any object glow for a long time at will.

CEActionWaterCreation.name: Water creation
CEActionWaterCreation.description: You create a temporary [color=#30caf5]water sphere[/color], which you can throw.

CEConsumableWaterDrop.name: water droplet
CEConsumableWaterDrop.description: Magic water, condensed into a droplet. It can be thrown to get something wet.

CEStatusEffectAgility.name: Agility
CEStatusEffectAgility.description: Your maximum stamina is increased by [color=#2bef1d]5[/color].

CEStatusEffectPathOfKnight.name: Path of the Knight
CEStatusEffectPathOfKnight.description: Knight skills may now appear in your blessing pool.

CEStatusEffectPathOfMage.name: Path of the Mage
CEStatusEffectPathOfMage.description: Mage skills may now appear in your blessing pool.

CEStatusEffectPathOfPriest.name: Path of the Priest
CEStatusEffectPathOfPriest.description: Priest skills may now appear in your blessing pool.

CEStatusEffectThickSkin.name: Thick Skin
CEStatusEffectThickSkin.description: You take 1 less damage from all sources (except poison).

CEStatusEffectVitality.name: Vitality
CEStatusEffectVitality.description: Your maximum health is increased by [color=#f54730]50[/color].

CEStatusEffectWisdom.name: Wisdom
CEStatusEffectWisdom.description: Your maximum mana is increased by [color=#3296fa]50[/color].

CEActionSpellAreaHealing.name: Prayer for health
CEActionSpellAreaHealing.description: You restore [color=1defa9]15 health[/color] to all creatures in a small area.

CEActionSpellCaringForOthers.name: Caring for others
CEActionSpellCaringForOthers.description: You restore [color=#1defa9]40 health[/color] to the creature you touch. But you can't treat yourself.

CEActionSpellCureWounds.name: Cure wounds
CEActionSpellCureWounds.description: You restore [color=#1defa9]25 health[/color] to the creature you touch.

CEActionSpellCurse.name: Curse
CEActionSpellCurse.description: You curse the selected area and all creatures within it.

CEActionSpellDivineShield.name: Divine Shield
CEActionSpellDivineShield.description: You apply a [color=#1defa9]1 divine shield[/color] on the target.

CEActionSpellHolyGround.name: Holy ground
CEActionSpellHolyGround.description: You bless the chosen territory and all the beings within it.

CEActionPurification.name: Purification
CEActionPurification.description: You cleanse the target of all negative status effects.

CEActionSpellWaterBurst.name: Water Burst
CEActionSpellWaterBurst.description: You call upon the waters, drenching a targeted area.

CEStatusEffectApostasy.name: Apostasy
CEStatusEffectApostasy.description: All your healing now deals [color=#E1341E]Fire[/color] damage instead.

CEStatusEffectBlackHeart.name: Black Heart
CEStatusEffectBlackHeart.description: You are immune to [color=#8752b3]Curse[/color]. When you deal damage in melee combat, you [color=#8752b3]curse[/color] targets.

CEStatusEffectBlessedAndProtected.name: Blessed and Protected
CEStatusEffectBlessedAndProtected.description: When you [color=#1defa9]bless[/color] a creature, you also grant it [color=#1defa9]1 Divine Shield[/color] (up to a maximum of 3)

CEStatusEffectExperiencedHealer.name: Experienced Healer
CEStatusEffectExperiencedHealer.description: When you heal something, you heal [color=#1defa9]5 health[/color] more.

CEStatusEffectHealingWaters.name: Healing Waters
CEStatusEffectHealingWaters.description: When you heal a [color=#1db7ef]wet target[/color], you heal [color=#1defa9]10 health[/color] more and dry it off.

CEStatusEffectWaterShield.name: Water Shield
CEStatusEffectWaterShield.description: When the [color=#1defa9]divine shield[/color] you've cast breaks, it triggers a repulsive [color=#1db7ef]water blast[/color].

CEMobSlimeFire.name: fire slime
CEMobSlimeFire.description: A wobbly blob of animated fire. Pops into a burst of flames when destroyed.

CEMobSlimeWater.name: water slime
CEMobSlimeWater.description: A wobbly blob of animated water. Pops into a splash when destroyed.

CEConsumablePotionAcceleration.name: acceleration potion
CEConsumablePotionAcceleration.description: Increases your movement speed for a short duration.

CEConsumablePotionAlchemicalFire.name: alchemical fire
CEConsumablePotionAlchemicalFire.description: A liquid flame, just waiting to burst forth and reduce everything around it to ashes. A large red label reads “DO NOT DRINK.”

CEConsumablePotionFrost.name: frost potion
CEConsumablePotionFrost.description: A liquid crystal so cold that it's uncomfortable to even hold the vial in your hands. If it were to break, everything around it would instantly.

CEConsumablePotionHealingSmall.name: small healing potion
CEConsumablePotionHealingSmall.description: A simple healing potion. Drink it, or throw it at whoever you want to see get well.

CEConsumablePotionHealingMedium.name: healing potion
CEConsumablePotionHealingMedium.description: A simple healing potion. Drink it, or throw it at whoever you want to see get well.

CEConsumablePotionManaSmallCondensated.name: condensated small mana potion
CEConsumablePotionManaSmallCondensated.description: Another entity's mana concentrate. Restores mana just like mana potions, but mana restoration modifiers do not apply.
CEConsumablePotionManaSmallCondensated.suffix: Condensated, mana restoring modifiers doesnt work.

CEConsumablePotionManaMediumCondensated.name: condensated mana potion
CEConsumablePotionManaMediumCondensated.description: Another entity's mana concentrate. Restores mana just like mana potions, but mana restoration modifiers do not apply.
CEConsumablePotionManaMediumCondensated.suffix: Condensated, mana restoring modifiers doesnt work.

CEConsumablePotionShield.name: potion of stone skin
CEConsumablePotionShield.description: A thick, metallic brew that coats the body in a shimmering barrier. Grants temporary shields against damage.

CEConsumablePotionStrength.name: strength potion
CEConsumablePotionStrength.description: Increases your melee damage for a short duration.

CEGoldenLockedDoor.name: golden locked door
CEGoldenLockedDoor.description: A heavy door sealed with a golden lock. It won't open without a key.

CEIronDoor.name: iron door
CEIronDoor.description: Well, if there's a solid iron door, there must be something valuable behind it.

CEIronDoorWindowed.name: iron windowed door
CEIronDoorWindowed.description: a solid iron door with a small window. You can look through it, of course, but it's hard to put your hand through.

CEWoodenDoor.name: wooden door
CEWoodenDoor.description: Not the most solid construction, but it's better than nothing.

CEWoodenDoorWindowed.name: wooden windowed door
CEWoodenDoorWindowed.description: Not the most solid construction, but it's better than nothing.

CEWallLeaf.name: leaf wall
CEWallLeaf.description: Dense, marginal bushes. You can climb through them, but watch out for thorny branches!

CEWorkbenchAlchemyTable.name: alchemy lab
CEWorkbenchAlchemyTable.description: A small setup with everything needed for brewing potions
